Help Center

Quick answers to common questions about QuickTransfer.

How do I share a file?

Simply drag and drop your file into the 'Send' card on the homepage. Once uploaded, you'll get a 6-digit code. Share this code with the recipient.

Is it really secure?

Yes. Files are encrypted during transfer and storage. The 6-digit code acts as a private key for the recipient.

What is the maximum file size?

Currently, you can share files up to 100MB per transfer for free.

How long do codes last?

By default, codes expire in 10 minutes. This ensures your data doesn't sit on our servers longer than necessary.
